items: Work shall be performed under near-empty conditions and shall not be performed with heavy loads.

When removing heavy parts such as engines and transmissions, weights equivalent to those of the parts to be removed shall be mounted to prevent the weight balance of the vehicle from being skewed and to ensure proper front-rear balance.
Do not lift up in any position other than the specified one.
When using a two-pillar lift, etc., be sure to refer to the manufacturer's instruction manual accompanying the lift and take all possible safety precautions.
Lift blocks (rigid racks) with rubber attachments should be used to avoid scratching the body.

blocks.text: 2. When lifting with a lift or other means, raise the lift until the wheels are raised and check that the rubber attachments are holding each lift point correctly. Also, shake the vehicle to ensure that the body is held firmly.

items: When lifting, be careful of the shape and position of the rubber attachments used to avoid scratching the side sill garnish.
